examples: He hurried out with an armful of brochures.
Anne, who was bringing an armful of flowers into the kitchen, saw his face too.
He persevered with his task until he had succeeded in collecting an armful of firewood.
He stops the car and rummages in the undergrowth, emerging with an armful of plants.
The tailor carried an armful of suits into a conference room, and the staff filed in for a fitting.
